title: RC playtest readiness
summary: Prepare the current post-packet-192 build for real observed playtest sessions without adding new feature breadth.

execution_order.goal: Scope the lane-1 internal RC playtest smoke pass.
execution_order.why_now: The project needs one player-facing proof pass after packet 192 before external sessions begin.

execution_order.goal: Scope the lane-2 playtest kit and observer rubric refresh.
execution_order.why_now: The existing alpha kit predates the current two-lane model and Source-to-Shore beta state.

execution_order.goal: Run the scoped internal RC playtest smoke pass and write findings.
execution_order.why_now: Boot, input, save staging, console health, and handheld UI proof are the immediate player-facing risks.

execution_order.goal: Update the observer-facing playtest kit and rubric for the current build.
execution_order.why_now: External observers need current instructions, privacy rules, and two-lane triage labels.

execution_order.goal: Review the internal RC playtest smoke report for blockers.
execution_order.why_now: The sprint should not send a broken or confusing build into observed sessions.

execution_order.goal: Review the refreshed playtest kit for clarity, privacy, and science-safe observation.
execution_order.why_now: The observer docs must gather useful evidence without leading children or collecting personal data.

execution_order.goal: Make the final RC playtest readiness decision.
execution_order.why_now: Only a combined proof and documentation review should decide whether external sessions can begin.

avoid: station, route, map, save, or overlay changes

completion_gate: Internal player-facing smoke proof has a report, evidence paths, and severity-ordered findings.
Observer playtest docs are current for the post-packet-192 build and the active two-lane model.
No new feature, route, station page, save schema, traversal system, inventory, combat, planner, or content pack lands.
Any P0/P1 issue discovered during the pass is either fixed in a newly scoped item or blocks external sessions explicitly.
Validation passes after queue or packet updates, and alpha RC status is recorded before final readiness signoff.
guardrails: Do not fabricate child playtest observations.
Do not record identifying child data in this repo.
Do not start a new gameplay expansion from packet 193.
Do not reactivate old external-feedback packets 155 or 156 without real repeated feedback patterns.
Keep findings concrete: what the player sees, how to reproduce it, why it matters, and which lane owns it.

lane_effort.lane-1: high, or xhigh if a smoke blocker touches save, route, station, or overlay behavior

post_packet_path: If clean, begin external observed sessions using the refreshed playtest kit.
If not clean, queue only the smallest blocker fixes before observed sessions.
After real sessions exist, synthesize repeated evidence before approving new feature or route expansion.
